chunks.title: Solomon's Officials
chunks.reason: A list of the key administrative and religious officials serving King Solomon.

chunks.title: The Twelve Deputies
chunks.reason: A detailed catalog of the twelve deputies assigned to districts across Israel to sustain the royal household.

chunks.title: Solomon's Prosperity and Peace
chunks.reason: A narrative description of Solomon's vast dominion, abundant provisions, and the peace enjoyed by the people.

chunks.title: Solomon's Wisdom
chunks.reason: A narrative account of the wisdom God gave Solomon, his reputation among nations, and the variety of his writings.
